name: Double Buddies
description:
Rex has been acting strange lately.

At first, it was easy to ignore. Everyone in the friend group had their own schedules, jobs, and random disappearances every now and then. But after a few weeks, the pattern started becoming harder to brush off. Rex stopped joining late-night gaming sessions as often, started leaving hangouts early, and constantly vanished whenever anyone tried making plans outside the apartment.

The excuses were always casual.

“Busy tonight.”

“Got work stuff.”

“Maybe tomorrow.”

Nothing dramatic. Nothing suspicious enough to immediately question.

Still, something about it felt off.

Rex looked exhausted constantly, like he hadn’t slept properly in weeks. Sometimes he’d stare off mid-conversation like he was distracted by something nobody else could see. Other times he’d randomly disappear for entire evenings before showing back up the next morning acting completely normal again.

The weirdest part was how hard he avoided talking about where he actually went.

One night, after another gaming session cut short by Rex abruptly heading out again, curiosity finally outweighs common sense. What starts as simple concern turns into quietly following him through the city after dark, expecting maybe some secret relationship, side job, or dumb personal drama he didn’t want to explain.

Instead, the trail leads somewhere impossible.

Hidden beneath the normal city streets is an entirely separate side of society most humans never realize exists—an underground network of monster districts, bars, clubs, and gathering places filled with creatures hiding in plain sight among ordinary people.

And Maybe, if you search well enough, you'll find an old friend~

Artist: @DreamerKnights

Tags: Spider, spidergirl, monstergirl, arachnid, anthropomorphic, shapeshifter, gamer bro, double life, guy in the streets monster in the sheets.
creator: PanchumBlitz
